content:
The developers are aware of performance issues. Typically when the local folder size is set to a high number of messages or a large number of accounts are present. They are working on refactoring the app which should improve this is a future release.

If you have the local folder size set to a high number of messages, try reducing this. Settings > account name > fetching mail: local folder size

Reference: https://github.com/thunderbird/thunderbird-android/issues/10373#issuecomment-3810077139

"The app's performance slows down when many messages are downloaded. This is because it currently loads all messages into memory at once."

"I tested this and performance begins to degrade noticeably once the message count exceeds 500. This is worse than tought, we need to improve the message handling. Propably database related, but the message list refactor could help too."

Reference: https://github.com/thunderbird/thunderbird-android/issues/10409#issuecomment-3811149422

"We recognize that the performance and loading times of the Message List are not optimal. We are currently working on a refactor to ensure the app runs smoothly, even when managing multiple accounts."
creator: platform34

content:
TBA v18 included a fix for a crash that sounds very similar to the one you describe.

  • Crash occurred when retrieving images from large messages (#10721)

It's possible the fix hasn't fully resolved the issue, or could be a different crash entirely. Please submit a bug report on github via the link below.

https://github.com/thunderbird/thunderbird-android/issues

It will help the developers if you can collect and attach a debug log with the report. A guide to obtain this is linked below.

https://thunderbird.github.io/thunderbird-android/docs/latest/user-guide/troubleshooting/collecting-debug-logs.html
creator: platform34

content:
Thunderbird for Android doesn't offer an auto-completion feature.

The feature has been requested by the community on Mozilla connect and is open to votes.

https://connect.mozilla.org/t5/ideas/add-auto-complete-email-recipient-suggestions-for-thunderbird-on/idi-p/74937
creator: platform34
